user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kristina Broad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXmDgTewf2HvGhKsYUAG47mu3ui6PW6sLqZN7Z4EG_3WowjWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a fantastic experience with Coops, they put on a second floor to our existing addition. The work that they did is of high quality, great materials and the finishings show attention to detail. Communication was easy from start to finish. Corey did the majority of the work, he came each day he was scheduled and has a terrific work ethic. He was very respectful and easygoing and worked around our family's needs. Each evening he cleaned up as if it was his own home. I was worried about having people in my home over the course of the reno, but I really appreciated how Kevin and Corey worked and would definitely hire them again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"F R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJKXpAYytAkGglaSX-ctBfNZNQTqUC9MFcio3ZsE6Zr-3IjWQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We contracted Coops Construction 2 summers ago to complete a backyard renovation. It involved tearing out our old deck and concrete sidewalk. Coops subcontracted Grills Concrete Plus to pour a new concrete patio and sidewalk.
While the initial work went well, it was the finishing touches that ruined the whole project. Instead of a poured step leading up to the kitchen sliding doors and into the house, Grills Concrete Plus talked us into putting a preformed step in this spot. A step that was to be stained to complement the color of the patio concrete.
Instead of a lovely step we got something that looks like a project an amateur DIY couple would do to save money. The staining of the step is an eyesore that draws the eye to it and makes our visitors comment on how awful it looks. In addition, rather than putting tarp down around the step and brick behind it prior to spraying the stain, Grills Concrete Plus stained the brick and brand-new concrete around the step. It is very obvious. There is a lot of sun in the spot and it really sticks out like a sore thumb.
The staining on the brick and surrounding concrete of the step cannot be cleaned. Coops and Grills Concrete Plus tried to remove it.
We were told by the project manager (who no longer is employed by Coops) that we will just have to live with the look. They tried their best.
Since then, there has been nothing but promises and more promises by Coops and Grills Concrete Plus that the step will be replaced with a new custom double step. This was to be pre-tinted to complement the patio slab. The bottom piece was to be large enough cover the stained-damaged patio and the second step high enough to cover the ruined brick.
September 2025 was the last email from Coops promising they would stay on top of Grills Concrete Plus to ensure the step is swapped out. Coops reassured that the step is ordered and this would be completed soon. Between September and the first snow in November nothing has been done.
We usually do not post anything negative about anyone, preferring instead to speak directly to the person involved to work out any differences. In this case though, after 2 summers, 2 winters, multiple emails and a project that cost over $20,000 we would not recommend either Coops Construction or Grills Concrete Plus. It is unfortunate because the backyard project was a trial to assess Coop’s work. We have indoor renovations planned and obviously Coops failed the test.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amanda Cross","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHfrJlJatgR22CDqkO1YTvfuumL4Ss9sLGFIlzykV-PlzBLA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience having hired Coops Construction for my bathroom renovation.  They handled everything right down to the tiny finishing details.  The crew was incredibly professional and Kevin did a fantastic job designing a layout that would fit my budget.  The job was completed on schedule.  In the past I've had some shady experiences with contractors but I  am beyond thrilled with my choice to hire Coops and the job they did.  Good honest people who are incredibly good at their jobs!!  I highly recommend Coops Construction.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Theresa McAlpine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxDT-Ow82PPtZMGAm1XDkFoxrBRLKuVH2RyRmvDrRQWinmTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our reno experience with this group of people was excellent! Professional, knowledgeable and great to work with. We would hire them again in a heartbeat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICC7oOL8AE&fid=0x0:0xc865eed89ee80583"],"When":"2020-8-23"},{"Name":"R N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJtfjR-pzHGLvv7sg7zJgvQXM2bAXM7FXpvvCjTxTlgmbVJ2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"LOL....I really dropped the ball hiring this company......never again!
This company sure could use a project manager, or at least someone who can pass the grade nine shop class test.
It's an uneasy feeling to hire "professionals" at a high cost and have them arrive just to find out you're the smartest guy in the room!
I waited over a month just to hear back while my belongings sat in a storage locker costing money. Then when they showed up they ask ME...."so what should we do"
Then halfway through the job he admitted he didn't quote the job properly and needed another $600.
Be VERY cautious of their NON refundable deposit, It's literally the only thing they have that's a guarantee!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Garland1234","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVp02qHNetuUMujEnvT-uxi4pteMTh6yKtux5QaxJ9Rc2LwgiY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We had this company install storm doors, storm windows on a sunroom. Upon completion they made an appointment to pick up the cheque, didn’t show up and no call to explain. Next day the guy just showed up and walked in our home, snooped around to find his cheque and left. Neither my husband nor myself knew he had come. Wow is all I can say.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Da Bear","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIe72J1ealjZHWOyqWPF1y-5EbIM01_jsAdT1v91rMtaDuAWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Coop's Construction tore down my wrap around deck and extended the  side of it. Huge 1033sq ft. They also rocked the siding and enclosed in under the deck.
Very professional guys. Would use them again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Parts Account","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL09HCECOLf0bS45uvpFbNZNsAaZHmb_wkDxNfNO0JBbT0h5A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We contracted coop to build a office in our shop gave him $15,000 for materials plans permits etc lead us on for months then said he wasn’t able to get approval and kept our money he’s a scam artist do not deal with him! You have been warned","Images":null,"When":""}]

Very pleased.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ron Law","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIHy8a9XtpQzjAkvDBxSIe7GiAzqo6yta8550-p8Xp4qij98g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Would not recommend!!! When John showed up the week before roof install to confirm shingle color I specifically told him about the new vent installed and not to remove it. Once roof was done and cleaned up I went up to check and they had removed my steel vent and replaced with cheap plastic one I would have to get up on my roof every month to clean lint out of. When I told John he insisted I never told him about the new vent. I asked him if he wanted me o just pay the amount for the roof minus the $100 cost for the vent and he insisted I pay the entire amount and he would replace the vent. I have contacted him 3 times and left voice messages over the last 8 months and he has never got back to me all over $100!?!?!? user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jolene D'Mello","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJ-Bsh7BuqdxsTFtnWbvMHiUzoxP7h-S_PHG5H_F9J_hU17oeo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m not one to typically leave reviews, however, we recently hired Fibre General Contracting to completely redo our backyard, and the experience was outstanding from start to finish. They built a brand new concrete patio, custom concrete stairs, and installed fresh sod, and the transformation was beyond what we imagined. They also planted four trees and added mulch where needed.

What truly set them apart was not just the quality of their work — which was meticulous and technically sound — but the way they operate as a family-run business. Every member of the team had a role to play, and it was genuinely heartwarming to see them work together, support each other, and make us feel cared for as clients. That kind of teamwork and pride in their craft is rare.

They were always reliable, responsive, and attentive to detail. They even went above and beyond by repairing our backyard gates without us even asking — just because they noticed it needed to be done.

We’ve worked with a number of contractors over the years, and Fibre General Contracting has truly been one of the best. Highly, highly recommend them if you’re looking for a team that does excellent work and treats your home like their own.

(Will be adding before & after photos so you can see the transformation — it speaks for itself!)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgLphnFhs2BNAZ1FzAx8vN&fid=0x0:0x2345701de16e8cb7"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"ADIT PATEL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPxyFPl5KvEqJPjxm5OCctfP5zZSgZ0X6opwJZi86LooVb5B1JLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’m extremely pleased with the backyard sodding work! title: BAKERS QUALITY ROOFING
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jim Blair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIrG4pIq_GyXCFvhBDzvorp_XFqs9CrqmdFMlPTnSNQqgh1hg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I hired Bakers Quality Roofing out of Woodstock, owned by Brad Baker, to do my roof—and it turned out to be a total nightmare. Brad was nowhere to be seen during the job. Instead, he sent a crew that clearly had no clue what they were doing.

Right from the start, the problems piled up:

• The starter shingles and drip edge were installed incorrectly leaving my eaves leaking like crazy.
• The eavestroughs weren’t even close to level —a basic requirement they couldn’t get right.
• When I contacted Brad, he eventually came back, only to do what I can only describe as another hack job, and then never to return at all.
• Flashing was left loose, nails were scattered everywhere, and the job was finished with zero attention to detail.

He claims to offer a 5-year workmanship warranty, but after the roof started leaking, it became clear that the warranty is not worth the paper it’s written on. Brad hasn’t stood behind his work in any meaningful way.

I don’t write reviews often, but homeowners need to be warned. Avoid Bakers Quality Roofing. Hire a reputable roofing company that takes pride in their work and stands by it. This was a costly and frustrating mistake that I wouldn’t wish on anyone.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJSCnNmVrOSV7AE&fid=0x0:0x19abbc5862dee361"],"When":"2025-5-19"},{"Name":"Chrick Cooddington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIXx_JwU3ARtGshcnIRbS-3QaOLkXeQi3EFyY6U7uqmU6R-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The owner is an amazing roofer but his son Justin I wouldn't let him shingle a dog house and I have a cat. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Alicia Egan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOWaBeKiq2UCY46gQOnPBySJor-f_MXqZvDeJ6705V7h3seA6HDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a rancid mold/earthy/soil like smell that began in our kitchen pantry. We could not figure out the smell for the life of us. For 4 days we drove ourselves crazy going through it with a fine tooth comb with no answers. My husband cut a whole in the ceiling as our master bath shower is directly above it and thought maybe it was leaking (though we had zero water damage of any kind). Frustrated, we called AP Hurley for some direction.
Shawn came to our home at no cost to inspect it. He came with his expertise, a water detection machine, spent almost an hour in our home with us trying to figure out the mystery smell. Upon leaving he was a stumped as us, handed us his card and said “Well, when you find it, let me know because I’m curious now!”
It wasn’t but 5 minutes after Shawn left that we finally found it!!  A tiny slit hole in an Uncle Ben’s rice pack (we had just bought last weekend) that had molded beyond comprehension 🤢

Of course, we messaged Shawn to advise, dropped off a thank you gift for his time and attempt to help us.

It was heart warming and very appreciated that Shawn came to our home at no cost where any other company I called wanted $309-500 just to come and look. Great customer service - Thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPtLufTQ&fid=0x0:0xafa3568717d6da5a"],"When":"2024-11-29"},{"Name":"Michelle Reilingh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyMYU3RhFx3odpcg3wTDtyQMeaP9vPh7aHwAlu3qyP0D4G96fz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had an issue with my basement leaking due to poor down spout drainage from my evestroughs.
